argument.script: async (intermediate) => { const aweme_id = "{{ aweme_id }}"; const url = 'https://creator.douyin.com/web/api/media/aweme/delete/?aid=1128'; const res = await fetch(url, { method: 'POST', credentials: 'include', headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' }, body: JSON.stringify({ aweme_id: aweme_id }) }).then(r => r.json()); if (res && res.status_code !== 0) { return [{ status: 'API错误 ' + res.status_code + ': ' + (res.status_msg || '') }]; } return [{ status: '已删除 ' + aweme_id }]; }
